name: vs-extension
description: Visual Studio Code extension to improve coding efficiency

cppClassCreator.autoImport.state.description: When enabled, auto import missing headers (require clangd)

cppClassCreator.autoImport.clangdTimeout.description: The maximum time (in milliseconds) to wait for clangd to analyzed created file

cppClassCreator.privateId.description: Starting string before a private identifier

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.dev: npm run compile-tailwind && npx @vscode/vsce package --allow-missing-repository --allow-star-activation && code --install-extension vs-extension-0.0.1.vsix
